channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump cancels signing of bipartisan housing bill, demanding voter-ID provision
item.description: President Donald Trump abruptly canceled the signing of a bill aimed at increasing housing affordability an hour before he was due at the Capitol for the ceremony.

item.title: U.S. crude oil dips below $70 as tankers transit Strait of Hormuz
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.

item.title: Amazon's Zoox unveils redesigned robotaxi ahead of upcoming expansion
item.description: Zoox is updating its robotaxis as the Amazon division plots expansion in additional markets and prepares to charge for rides.

item.title: S&P 500 rises as oil slides, traders await Micron earnings: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 moved higher on Wednesday as oil prices fell, with investors looking ahead to the release of Micron Technology's earnings after the bell.

item.title: Slate Auto says each $24,950 electric pickup truck will be profitable as it aims to be cash-flow positive next year
item.description: EV startup Slate Auto CEO Peter Faricy told CNBC that every vehicle the company produces will be gross margin positive.

item.title: Tom Lee says this is a classic opportunity to buy the dip in chip stocks once again
item.description: He describes the downturn this week as "buyable pullback."

item.title: New meme stock Wendy's soars 30% with trading halted at one point
item.description: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.

item.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent says U.S. GDP growth can return to 3% before end of the year
item.description: Bessent sees his "3-3-3" plan as still in reach — 3% growth, a 3% deficit-to-GDP rate and a 3 million barrels per day increase in oil production.

item.title: Trump claims Iran has assured U.S. there won't be tolls on the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: There will be no tolls, insurance costs, or charges of any kind for ships looking to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said.

item.title: Kalshi CEO says prediction market thinking about IPO, but not for this year
item.description: Tarek Mansour said to CNBC's "Squawk Box" it made sense for the company at the stage to think about a debut on public markets.

item.title: Federal student loans have a new interest rate discount — here's who qualifies
item.description: To qualify for the U.S. Department of Education's new interest rate discount on student loans, borrowers must meet several requirements. Here's what to know.

item.title: France suffers major power outage as Europe sizzles in record-breaking heat
item.description: A heat-related power outage left around 68,000 homes without electricity in western France as record-breaking heat sweeps Europe.

item.title: OpenAI unveils first chip as part of Broadcom deal in effort to 'build the full stack'
item.description: Eight months after announcing a custom chip deal, OpenAI and Broadcom are revealing their first joint project: Jalapeño.

item.title: U.S. Treasury will oversee frozen Iranian funds when they're released, Bessent says
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said once Iranian frozen assets are released, they will be overseen by Treasury and routed largely to U.S. agriculture, medicines.

item.title: This small cap is flying under the radar as a supplier to SpaceX and the new space economy
item.description: Graham Corporation is getting a lift from SpaceX going public.

item.title: Tech stocks try to rebound after global AI sell-off batters chip companies
item.description: Technology stocks mostly rebounded on Wednesday amid choppy trading following a global selloff in the previous session.

item.title: Polymarket-backed platform boosts funding to root out insider trading on prediction markets
item.description: A Polymarket-backed platform raised $1.5 million in a funding round to help build tools to detect suspicious trading activity.

item.title: Qualcomm inks deal for AI startup Modular to bolster software stack, data center build-out
item.description: Qualcomm is looking to expand its position in the data center market as AI demand skyrockets.

item.title: Chief of staff to former NYC Mayor Eric Adams arrested in federal bribery probe, AP source says
item.description: A chief of staff to former New York City Mayor Eric Adams and several other people have been arrested as part of an investigation into an alleged bribery scheme.

item.title: Defense stocks plummet on reports Germany is scrapping warships; Rheinmetall stock down 19%
item.description: Berlin is planning to scrap a multi-billion-euro project to build the F126 frigates, according to reports.

item.title: We're buying the dip in a stock that we have been itching to get bigger in
item.description: The selloff is finally giving us a chance to build up this tiny position around our initial cost basis.

item.title: How much should a honeymoon cost? Here's the average price tag — and how to pay for yours
item.description: With the average cost of a honeymoon topping $6,000, these tools can help you pay for the trip.

item.title: South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
item.description: The company plans to issue 17.79 million new shares at a value of 45.45 trillion won ($29.65 billion).

item.title: Tech companies would have to pay AI data center energy costs under bill moving in Congress
item.description: A House subcommittee may advance legislation Wednesday to make tech companies pay the energy costs for operating data centers to power AI.

item.title: The biggest wealth transfer in history is here: How the next generation will spend the trillions
item.description: The greatest wealth transfer is underway, and heirs who are set to inherit are preparing to use the money very differently from the generations that built it.

item.title: Three New York Democrats backed by Mamdani win House seat primaries; 2 incumbents lose
item.description: Two candidates backed by the Democratic Socialist of America won their primaries, a year after the DSA-backed Zohran Mamdani won New York mayor's race.

item.title: Ukraine is raising the cost of war for Russia — and testing Putin's resolve
item.description: A string of political victories and deep-strike successes has bolstered confidence in Ukraine amid its long-running war with Russia.

item.title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, AMD, Reddit, Blackberry, Arm, Take-Two, Barclays & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

item.title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
item.description: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

item.title: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt sale less than two weeks after IPO
item.description: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.
